meaning: n.悬挂的方式,(动作的)暂停,中止vt.悬挂,附着,装饰,绞死,踌躇,使悬而未决,垂下vi.悬着,垂下,被绞死,悬而不决
examples: It's OK—hang loose and stay cool.
Can you just hang on a sec?
The smells of freshly made pastry, noodle soup and stir fry hang in the air.
The Hang Seng index of 33 blue-chip companies is already trading near its four-year lows.
